---
title: "\'Thoughts on Pictures\'"
---

## \'Thoughts on Pictures\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1853
**Genre:** Non-fiction, art criticism
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Magazine for the Young</i> (March 1853-October 1856)

### Notes

There is a fictional frame story into which the descriptions of pictures are fitted.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
